input.subject: Contributor appearing in filmed interviews and daily life footage

test_cases.notes: Grant of rights clause covers all required elements. Plain-language summary at top. Editorial independence clause present. Producer guidance note identifies all customisation points. Compensation clearly stated as zero.

test_cases.notes: Location release correctly differentiated from talent release. Property owner's rights vs tenant rights flagged in guidance note. Filming schedule provisions included.
